_comment: Layer 3 tripwire. extract.py refuses to run if any slot is null, and aborts if any extracted value drifts. Verify each value against the cited source before kicking off the pipeline.
q1_revenue_usd_m__source: p5 highlights: 'Revenue was $511 million'; p9 income statement: 'Revenue, net $ 511.0'
q1_eps_non_gaap__source: p5: 'non-GAAP EPS was $2.09'; p14 non-GAAP recon: 'Non-GAAP earnings per share $ 2.09'
q2_guide_rev_mid_usd_m__source: p6: 'Revenue $540 million +/- $20 million'; p15 Q2 recon range $520-$560 confirms midpoint
q2_guide_eps_mid__source: p6: 'Non-GAAP EPS $2.18 +/- $0.25'; p15 Q2 non-GAAP recon $1.93-$2.43 confirms midpoint
bac_pt__source: p1 header 'PO: 430.00 USD'; p1 Key Changes 'Price Obj. 330.00 -> 430.00'
bac_cy27_pe__source: p1 body: 'now on 36x CY27E PE (vs. 33x prior...)'
bac_cy27_eps_new__source: p1 Key Changes '2027E EPS 9.90 12.00'; p1 estimates table 'EPS 3.71 6.41 9.36 12.00 14.12'; p3 fiscal table 'FY27E ... $9.90 $12.00'
bac_cy27_eps_prior__source: p1 Key Changes '2027E EPS 9.90 12.00' (left column = prior)
cowen_pt__source: p1 header 'Price Target: $350.00 (Prior $300.00)'; p1 rationale 'Remain Hold (PT $350, 28x CY27)'
cowen_cy27_eps_new__source: p1 prose: 'we see ~$9.80 and $12.50 in EPS for CY26/27'; p1 EPS row '$6.41 $9.79 $12.50'; p4 model table
_market_data: Current price as of May 4 per BAC stock-data block
current_price_may_4__source: BAC p1 header 'Price: 387.03 USD'; BAC p1 Stock Data 'Price 387.03 USD'
_bloomberg_consensus: From BAC p1 row 'Consensus EPS (Bloomberg) 8.75 10.83 12.33' aligned to header 'Estimates (Dec) (US$) 2024A 2025A 2026E 2027E 2028E' (consensus row has 3 forward years: CY26E, CY27E, CY28E)
bloomberg_cy26_consensus_eps__source: BAC p1 consensus row, position 1 of 3 (CY26E); also appears in Cowen p1 consensus EPS row position 2
bloomberg_cy27_consensus_eps__source: BAC p1 consensus row, position 2 of 3 (CY27E); also appears in Cowen p1 consensus EPS row position 3
bloomberg_cy28_consensus_eps__source: BAC p1 consensus row, position 3 of 3 (CY28E); single-source (Cowen does not publish CY28 consensus)
